title: betula papyrifera subsp. humilis
intro: Betula papyrifera subsp. humilis, also known as the dwarf birch, is a small shrub or tree species belonging to the Betulaceae family. The medicinal properties of Betula papyrifera subsp. humilis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. Herbal preparations of Betula papyrifera subsp. humilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
